prompt_used: This is Villain. A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. Work the case in order: secure protocol signed payload, confirm the scene at smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes, and do not let Root Administrator choose the pace. Trust the evidence before you trust the performance.
source_prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Create villain voice profile for Root Administrator. Worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output.. Manner: Dry sarcasm about human latency.. Include escalation stage cues for stage 1-4 intimidation.
